sections.paragraph:
Original: אתּנּה אתּנה אתּן אתּם אתּי את אתּ אתּה o

Transliteration: 'attâh 'attâ 'ath 'attı̂y 'attem 'atten 'attênâh 'attênnâh

Phonetic: at-taw'

BDB Definition:

  1. you (second person singular masculine)

Origin: a primitive pronoun of the second person

TWOT entry: 189

Part(s) of speech:
